title: Inline <script> tags in PHP output
summary: Inline script tags in PHP-rendered output are commonly flagged in WordPress.org review and should usually be replaced with enqueued scripts.

detection.notes: A future engine should allow JSON script exceptions and better context handling.

guidance.why_it_matters: WordPress plugin review expects scripts to be loaded with WordPress enqueue APIs so dependencies, scope, and loading behavior remain predictable.
guidance.fix: Use wp_enqueue_script() and wp_add_inline_script() instead of echoing raw script tags.
guidance.false_positive_risk: Medium. Escaped examples and JSON script payloads may need suppression logic.
